title: How to change plans
meta-description: You can change plans during the Open Enrollment period, even after your coverage starts.
bite: You can change plans during the Open Enrollment period, even after your coverage starts.
excerpt: To change your health or dental plan:
content:
To change your health or dental plan:

  • Log into your Marketplace account.
  • Select your application, then select "My Plans and Programs" from the list on the left
  • Select “Change plans.” 
  • Select "Change Health Plan" and choose a new plan.
  • Check your coverage dates. If your new plan has the same effective date as your old plan, then coverage from your old plan is cancelled when coverage from the new plan starts. If the new plan has a different effective date, then you’ll stay covered by your old plan until the day before your new coverage starts, as long as you continue paying your premiums.

To pick a different plan, you can also call the Marketplace Call Center at 1-800-318-2596 (TTY: 1-855-889-4325).
